overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a foggy, neon-lit futuristic city. The player crosses a multi-lane street, passes under an overpass with colorful lighting, ascends stairs to an upper pedestrian plaza with holographic advertisements, and continues through a covered walkway toward distant figures.

events.description: black sedan with headlights on drives past from left to right
steps onto the crosswalk and begins crossing the street

agents.ego_description: waiting at the street curb then stepping onto the yellow crosswalk and walking across the multi-lane road

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving past with headlights illuminated, moving left to right across the frame

entered.detail: broad pedestrian crossing with bold yellow diagonal stripes painted on asphalt
elevated highway or monorail track with colorful neon underlighting visible in the distance
large digital advertisement display showing a character in combat gear with text overlay
tall pole with bright white lamp illuminating the foggy street atmosphere

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at street level on a foggy night, facing a multi-lane road with a yellow-striped crosswalk. A black sedan passes by with headlights cutting through the haze. The camera waits briefly then steps onto the crosswalk, moving forward across the street toward the opposite sidewalk where neon-lit structures await.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway beneath elevated highway

events.description: reaches the opposite sidewalk and transitions from open street to covered pedestrian walkway
turns slightly left while continuing forward along the walkway toward the stairs

agents.ego_description: walking along the concrete sidewalk beneath the overpass, passing other pedestrians moving in the opposite direction

notable_agents.action: person in dark clothing walking toward the camera across the crosswalk
person in tank top and dark pants walking from right to left across the path

entered.detail: paved pedestrian walkway with blue and yellow painted curb lines along the edge
wide concrete stairs leading up to upper level, illuminated by pink and blue neon edge lighting
white and blue metal railing separating the walkway from the street level below

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the street, the camera moves along a concrete sidewalk sheltered beneath an elevated highway structure. The space is lit by colorful neon lights from above. Other pedestrians walk past in the opposite direction as the camera approaches a wide staircase on the left leading to an upper level.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper pedestrian plaza with digital advertising displays

events.description: ascends stairs to upper pedestrian level with colorful illuminated ceiling panels
passes under ceiling panels cycling through rainbow colors (green, blue, yellow, orange, red)

agents.ego_description: walking up the stairs and continuing along the upper plaza walkway beneath shifting colored lights, passing illuminated planters

entered.detail: smooth tiled flooring of the upper pedestrian plaza
large curved digital display showing animated advertisements featuring a character with purple hair and glowing elements
rectangular concrete planter containing trees and shrubs, lit from below with warm yellow light
overhead lighting panels cycling through rainbow colors (green, blue, yellow, orange, red, purple)

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends to an upper pedestrian plaza featuring large digital billboards displaying animated advertisements with a purple-haired character. The walkway is lined with illuminated concrete planters containing trees, and the ceiling features colorful light panels that shift through rainbow hues. The space is covered but open to the foggy night air.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow pedestrian corridor between high-rise buildings

events.description: walkway narrows significantly as it passes between tall building walls with reduced overhead lighting
continues straight toward two stationary figures standing near a wall-mounted sign in the distance

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrowing corridor between buildings toward two distant figures standing near signage

notable_agents.action: two figures standing together near a wall-mounted sign, facing the approaching camera

entered.detail: dark facade of high-rise building with small illuminated windows and decorative lighting
yellow and black wall-mounted signage with symbols, illuminated by spotlights
wall section with purple LED strip lighting and geometric metal patterns

segments.scene_description: Moving past the digital billboards, the camera enters a narrower corridor between tall buildings. The colorful ceiling lights give way to darker walls with purple accent lighting. Two figures stand in the distance near a yellow wall sign as the camera approaches them through the foggy, enclosed walkway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a foggy street level up into a neon-drenched pedestrian plaza and through a narrow urban corridor. It begins at a multi-lane road where a black sedan cuts through the haze, before the camera steps onto a yellow-striped crosswalk to reach the opposite sidewalk. As the camera moves forward, the environment shifts beneath the shelter of an elevated highway lit by colorful neon, passing pedestrians while approaching a wide staircase. The scene then ascends to an upper plaza filled with shifting rainbow light panels and large digital billboards featuring a purple-haired character among illuminated planters. Finally, the camera leaves the open plaza to enter a narrower, enclosed walkway where the bright colors fade into dark walls with purple accents, moving toward two distant figures standing by a yellow sign.
